title: pelargonium × brevipes
intro: Pelargonium × brevipes, also known as the cape pelargonium or a type of geranium, is a perennial plant species in the family Geraniaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing fever and soothing digestive issues, due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × brevipes include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its use as a natural remedy for anxiety and stress relief. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × brevipes often come in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
